description_long: This is a large, heavily armored combat vehicle with a long, prominent main cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The hull is rectangular with sloped armor on the front and sides, and the turret features additional sloped plating for increased protection. The vehicle is equipped with wide, continuous metal tracks on both sides, supported by multiple road wheels, allowing it to traverse rough terrain. The surface is painted in a uniform tan color, with no visible camouflage patterns or military markings. The top of the turret has several hatches and what appears to be a secondary mount for a machine gun. The overall design emphasizes durability, firepower, and battlefield survivability.
description: A large, tan-colored armored combat vehicle with a long cannon, sloped turret, and wide metal tracks. It features heavy armor plating and multiple hatches on the turret.
description_view_0: Front view showing the long main cannon, sloped frontal armor, and the symmetrical arrangement of the tracks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the cannon, the full set of road wheels, and the sloped turret profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hull, rear armor, and the ends of the tracks.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the turret, cannon, and track system in detail.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret front; one secondary machine gun mount visible on the turret roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with sloped and reinforced sections on the front, sides, and turret; appears thick and robust.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid tan color; no camouflage pattern visible.
